{{Infobox character
| name = Duster
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|fire}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|gunsmith}}
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Sea and Shadow (novel)|Of Sea and Shadow]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Duster is an alias used by [[Dalton Foster]], a man over seventy years old with gray hair, a beard, and two pairs of spectacles. Though he frequently forgets his false name, he is a skilled former gunsmith capable of assembling pistols or muskets that function in damp conditions. He carries a wide leather belt outfitted with numerous pockets and small tools, which gives him the appearance of a leatherworker. While he identifies as a [[Reader]], he notes that his abilities do not include significant fire magic. He has previously lived in the [[Capital]] and was traveling through [[Silverreach]].}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Duster]] is the false name used by [[Dalton Foster]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c7">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Duster is an elderly gunsmith characterized by a wild mane of gray hair and a thick, nest-like beard. As a [[Reader]] and the [[Vessel]] of a [[Soulbound]] craftsman, he possesses unique capabilities. During his confrontation with an [[Inquisitor]], he utilizes fire as a weapon.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Duster]] is an old man with a wild mane of gray hair and a nest of a beard.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c13">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Duster]] is a [[Reader]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Duster]] is an old gunsmith.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Duster]] is the [[Vessel]] of a [[Soulbound]] craftsman.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Duster]] is a character who uses fire against an [[Inquisitor]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c13" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“Duster,” he said pointedly. Foster had a history of forgetting his false name.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c7" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Readers]]
[[Category:Soulbound]]
